name: Gammon Infrastructure Projects Limited
summary: Gammon Infrastructure Projects Limited develops various infrastructure projects in India. The company develops roads and expressways, ports, airports, railways, power transmission lines, and special economic zones, as well as undertakes urban infrastructure, water and wastewater management, hydro power, and agricultural infrastructure projects. It also provides project advisory services; and operation and maintenance services for the transportation sector. The company was incorporated in 2001 and is based in Mumbai, India.
